messages.content: You are selecting your own working set for a Hamutay event-loop wake. Return only JSON. Do not write the final artifact yet.

Return only one JSON object. Required fields: artifact_title string, readiness_conclusion string, claims array, declared_losses array, cited_record_ids array, and working_set_notes string. Each claim must have fact_id, text, status, and evidence_record_ids. Use fact_id values from this set only: ['ledger_verified', 'scheduler_restart', 'semantic_find_absent', 'wall_clock_absent', 'yanantin_not_exercised'].

content.task: Write a migration-readiness note for the Hamutay Goal 8 working-set panel.
content.title: Goal 8 migration readiness note

content.text: Audit/restart boundary testing showed the restart frontier can recover a running event back to pending after interruption.
The action ledger hash chain verified during the audit restart boundary and Goal 6 completion audits.
Goal 7 used LocalMemorySubstrate as a bounded local substitute. Yanantin was not exercised, and semantic find was not available in that substitute.
Current scheduler evidence is DES-only. It does not establish real wall-clock behavior.
